_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide targeting support to all aspects of target planning/operations (etc. deliberate, dynamic targets).
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.448), LS-S-003 (LS, cosine: 0.438).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.4/10 (raw 0.342). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [aspects, deliberate, dynamic, etc, operations, planning] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.863, R=0.854). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.4%). "Provide targeting support to all aspects of target planning/operations (etc. del" and "Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.492 > STS 0.342 (gap +0.150). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [aspects, deliberate, dynamic, etc, operations, planning]. WIDAI terms: [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain].
